title: Civic offices of the land
preface: The town runs on visible work wearing older names. Magic is one of the layers that keeps the work speakable in story form without freezing it into a org chart.

layers.name: Civic function
layers.role: What the town is actually doing

layers.name: Craft analogy
layers.role: What a workshop or company might recognize

offices.surface: Where boonberry light is measured at dawn and sealed for distribution.
offices.civic: Measurement, audit, and the public claim that a total is true.
offices.craft: Reporting, accounting, KPIs, and the pressure to publish clean numbers.
offices.storyHook: What happens when the seal is intact but the measure is wrong?

offices.surface: Where boon and bane sit under shared weather and bargain without declaring war.
offices.civic: Governance under constraint—competing goods that must share one roof.
offices.craft: Product decisions, stakeholder negotiation, brand polarity held in one room.
offices.storyHook: Who leaves the table before the questions begin?

offices.surface: Stoves that stay lit only if the harvest measure reaches the right streets.
offices.civic: Delivery to those who feel scarcity first when a promise fails.
offices.craft: Customers, members, or teams whose lived outcome is the real scoreboard.
offices.storyHook: Name who goes cold when a ledger prefers silence.

offices.surface: Shelves built to make every decision look inevitable after the fact.
offices.civic: Institutional memory, documentation, and the politics of what is filed.
offices.craft: Knowledge bases, brand books, process docs—and what they omit.
offices.storyHook: Which page is missing on purpose?

offices.surface: A thicket that replays testimony until the path chooses what to amplify.
offices.civic: Rumor, residual message, and overflow that the polished record will not hold.
offices.craft: Brand memory, word of mouth, residual campaigns, unresolved feedback loops.
offices.storyHook: Is the echo evidence—or a summons?

offices.surface: Wax and sigils that travel with a claim so strangers know whom to trust.
offices.civic: Trust marks, authorized statements, and the cost of a forged permission.
offices.craft: Sponsorship, affiliate routes, co-branded claims, paid placement that must still feel earned.
offices.storyHook: Can a mark fund the work without rewriting the story?

offices.surface: A figure who makes the dispute visible without offering a simpler theft story.
offices.civic: The ethical interruption—QA, red team, or conscience that refuses clean fiction.
offices.craft: Internal writing and review that inserts real process tension into the tale.
offices.storyHook: Who is allowed to break the story so the values stay true?

offices.surface: Where chambers are seeded, revised, and set into the monument on a calendar of stones.
offices.civic: The writing team as a living office—roles, cadence, and editorial judgment.
offices.craft: Content systems, serial production, brand storytelling, and commissioned monuments.
offices.storyHook: What would it take to raise a neighboring chamber in your own land?
